text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then. Are your preparations complete, Agnes Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I'm ready whenever you are, President.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is the jewel of a distinguished bloodline, with talent
so great that others overlooked her normally truant behavior.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she's up against Symboli Rudolf—the Emperor who reigns over
Tracen Academy with her overwhelming prowess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And here I am, an unexpected witness to this fight between
titans—the intensity of this race is giving me goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Pant... You're the Emperor, all right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two are neck and neck, but Symboli Rudolf looks like she has the
upper hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now they're entering the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(The existence of virtual particles that travel faster than light without
contradicting special relativity has yet to be disproven.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(The top speed of an Umamusume is theorized to be about seventy
kilometers per hour, but there's no data that rejects the possibility of
overcoming that!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(Understand? It's about potential! My body—and my legs—are
overflowing with potential!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon's expression changes abruptly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hgh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Faster! Faster! Faster!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The latent potential within an Umamusume's legs! The limits of this
body's speed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've yet to see even a glimpse of either, for I know that they lie
beyond the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes glitter like those of an innocent girl... or maybe a deranged
scientist drowning in her own desire—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her passion takes my breath away.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm exhausted! Absolutely incredible, Agnes Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, how nice of you. You are the victor, though.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Only by a nose—Nay, we finished at essentially the same time. You
are a formidable foe.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is why letting you go would be too great of a loss. Have you had
a change of heart? Perhaps even a little?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Was this run your attempt to make me feel longing for this academy?
If so, I regret to inform you—I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see... Then, what about after hearing his story?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see... Then, what about after hearing her story?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whose story?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whose story?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? What's that look on your face for?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How should I put this—you look rather impassioned. Perhaps even
driven to madness?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about how Agnes Tachyon ran in that race just
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet she said that her limits lie "beyond the horizon." Which
means—Agnes Tachyon can still run much, much faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Faster! Faster! Faster!
choice_data_list: (I want to see it... I want to see that future!)
(I want to see it... I want to see that future!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey now, don't play dumb with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You want to scout me, don't you? Well, cut it out—I don't need any
more delays to my research.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right, Agnes Tachyon isn't looking for a normal trainer. For her, even daily training is just another facet of her research. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eureka, I've got it!
choice_data_list: Do you have any of that medicine on you?
Do you have any of that medicine on you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I do, but what's it to you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab the suspiciously-colored medicines right out of Agnes
Tachyon's outstretched hand...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And finish all three in one gulp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...I'm shocked.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Dare I say, even impressed. Ha... Ha! AHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such a willing test subject! Were you a guinea pig in
your past life?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You certainly say some delightful things. So you're okay with being
my test subject? You're okay with me stripping you of your human
rights? Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...What caused this change of heart?
choice_data_list: I also want to see what lies beyond your limits.
I also want to see what lies beyond your limits.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And there it is. Truly driven to madness, huh? Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Very well. Follow me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Slow on the uptake, aren't you? To the staff room, of course. I can't
drop out if I have a trainer counting on me, now can I?
choice_data_list: So you accept my scouting offer?
So you accept my scouting offer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, you'll be my guinea pig—perhaps even worse than that. But
if you're okay with that, then come with me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you what lies beyond our limits—what nobody has yet to
witness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my days of being experimented upon by Agnes Tachyon
begin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, actually, let's wait a second. At least until the side effects wear
off. It'd be a bother if you caused unnecessary confusion or chaos.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Haven't you noticed? You're glowing. Greenish gold, if I might add.
